entry.title: IDC 47QFCA22D0344 (PS0003) awarded to WINTEC ARROWMAKER, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE THE REQUIRED CLAUSE FOR THE FEDERAL ACQUISITION SUPPLY CHAIN SECURITY ACT ORDERS - PROHIBITION (ALTERNATE I) (DEC 2023) INTO THE CONTRACT.

entry.title: IDC 47QFCA22D0344 (PS0004) awarded to VERTEX AEROSPACE LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE EXECUTIVE ORDERS AND FAR CLAUSE 52.240-1 PROHIBITION OF UNMANNED AIRCRAFT SYSTEMS MANUFACTURED OR ASSEMBLED BY AMERICAN SECURITY DRONE ACT-COVERED FOREIGN ENTITIES

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
